flags.concern: The plan still does not identify a concrete repository-backed source for the primary variant ID/URL at drag time. In the current GenerationsPane data flow, gallery items are generation records, and the fields needed to drag the primary `generation_variants` row are not actually present on `image` today.
flags.evidence: `src/shared/hooks/projects/useProjectGenerations.ts:287-304` selects generation fields from `generations` but does not select `primary_variant_id` or join `generation_variants`. `src/shared/lib/generationTransformers.ts:146-169` defines `RawGeneration` without `primary_variant_id`, and `src/shared/lib/generationTransformers.ts:263-375` transforms generations without adding any top-level `variantId`. `src/shared/components/MediaGallery/types.ts:18-62` also has no primary-variant field on `GeneratedImageWithMetadata`. The revised Step 4 says to read `image.metadata?.variant_id` or similar, but this repository path does not currently provide that data.

flags.concern: Some step sections still do not include a file reference in backticks, so the plan does not fully satisfy the per-step file-reference requirement.
flags.evidence: The validator warning remains: `Each step section should reference at least one file in backticks.` Steps such as `## Step 3`, `## Step 8`, and `## Step 12` are validation-only sections and do not cite any file paths.
